howItWorks.intro: This song key & bpm match calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: BPM Range
rules.explanation: The current tempo multiplied by your acceptable percentage range.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.a: Harmonic mixing uses the Camelot wheel to blend songs in compatible musical keys, creating smoother transitions without clashing notes.

faq.q: How much can I adjust BPM when mixing?
faq.a: Staying within 3-5% BPM change sounds natural. Beyond 8% the pitch shift becomes noticeable without key lock.
